issue.body:
### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard for iOS ### AdGuard version Version 4.5.16(1043) ### What type of problem have you encountered? Website or app doesn't work properly ### Which browser(s) do you use? Chrome, Safari ### Which device do you use? Mobile ### Where is the problem encountered? http://blog.livedoor.jp/kinisoku / hochi.news / daily.co.jp ### Ad Blocking EasyList ### Privacy _No response_ ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security _No response_ ### Other _No response_ ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots 1. I’m enabled only EasyList filter The reason I only enabled EasyList was to isolate the cause. I noticed the same issue occurs even with multiple filters, so I wanted to see if EasyList specifically triggers it. Additionally, I'm experiencing the same problem on other websites as well. How do you suggest we resolve this? 2. Screenshots
Screenshot 1
Screenshot 2: setting the AdGuard Filter
### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

comment.body:
@Alex-302 My apologies for the late response; I've had a lot of personal matters to attend to. I tried the steps you requested, but the same situation persists. It's difficult to identify which specific filter is causing the issue on Mobile Safari, which makes troubleshooting even harder. Most Japanese sites seem to be affected by the EasyList filter. I will continue to look for a solution on my end.
screenshots

@Alex-302 
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/iVPGHZ_D-Ls

1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS -> 프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

issue.body:
### Prerequisites

- [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml);
- [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue;
- [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date;
- [x] Browser version is up-to-date;
- [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue.

### What product do you use?

AdGuard DNS

### AdGuard version

AdGuard DNS

### What type of problem have you encountered?

Website or app doesn't work properly

### Which browser(s) do you use?

Chrome

### Which device do you use?

Desktop

### Where is the problem encountered?

static2.manualslib.com

### Ad Blocking

AdGuard Base filter

### Privacy

_No response_

### Social Widgets

_No response_

### Annoyances

_No response_

### Security

_No response_

### Other

_No response_

### DNS filters

AdGuard DNS filter

### Language-specific

_No response_

### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled?

_No response_

### Add your comment and screenshots

Hello AdGuard Team,

It appears that the domain static2.manualslib.com is currently blocked by AdGuard DNS.

This domain is used as a static CDN resource for the website manualslib.com, which hosts user manuals and documentation for various devices. The blocked domain serves images, scripts, and other static assets required for the normal operation of the website.

DNS trace result:

dig +trace static2.manualslib.com

Result:

static2.manualslib.com. 1200 IN CNAME cdn50181425.ahacdn.me.


dig static2.manualslib.com @94.140.14.14
Result:
; <<>> DiG 9.10.6 <<>> static2.manualslib.com @94.140.14.14
;; global options: +cmd
;; Got answer:
;; ->>HEADER<<- opcode: QUERY, status: NOERROR, id: 12142
;; flags: qr rd ra; QUERY: 1, ANSWER: 1, AUTHORITY: 0, ADDITIONAL: 1

;; OPT PSEUDOSECTION:
; EDNS: version: 0, flags:; udp: 4096
; OPT=15: 00 11 ("..")
;; QUESTION SECTION:
;static2.manualslib.com.		IN	A

;; ANSWER SECTION:
static2.manualslib.com.	3600	IN	A	0.0.0.0

;; Query time: 98 msec
;; SERVER: 94.140.14.14#53(94.140.14.14)
;; WHEN: Fri Mar 06 15:07:53 MSK 2026
;; MSG SIZE  rcvd: 73


Because of this block, users who use AdGuard DNS may experience incomplete page loading or missing static content on manuals pages.

Could you please review this domain and verify whether it was blocked intentionally?  
If this is a false positive, we would appreciate removing it from the DNS filter.

Thank you for your time and for maintaining the filter lists.

Best regards

### Privacy

- [x] I agree to follow this condition

issue.title: themoviedb.org
issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [http://themoviedb.org](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=http%3A%2F%2Fthemoviedb.org) ### Comment > Good day. > So I can't open "themoviedb.org" while having only AdGuard DOH enabled, but if I additionally add, lets say, Quad9 DOH, then site opens normally, but that is not a desired setup. If possible, I want to only keep Adguard DOH. > Also, I have tried to make custom rules for DNS server allowing themoviedb.org domain, but that didn't work either. > > Thanks, > Best regards, > Maksim ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://reports.adguard.info/stcdn/sitereports/4e0lz68rpciso4ckgg0owgs8s8gwko86g8ckn42fxk.png?nc=1)
